projectDescription: A WordPress plugin that provides shortcodes for embedding YouTube videos, Facebook posts, category grids, and latest posts with dynamic AJAX loading and responsive layouts.
keyFeatures: YouTube Data API v3 integration with quota-efficient playlistItems endpoint
Separate display modes for long videos (>60s) and Shorts (≤60s)
Facebook Graph API v25.0 post feed with photo and video support
Responsive category grid with featured image backgrounds and post counts
Latest posts shortcode with three layout modes: vertical, grid-1, grid-2
AJAX-powered dynamic loading for YouTube and Facebook feeds
12-hour transient caching for YouTube results; 5-minute caching for Facebook
Automatic related post recommendations appended after single post content
WordPress admin panel with dedicated settings pages for each integration
Secure API key and token storage via wp-config.php constants or admin options
